name: Schoox Workforce Learning API
what_it_does: Schoox workforce learning management REST API for frontline worker training, compliance certification, and performance development in restaurant, retail, and hospitality industries. Enables AI agents to manage learner enrollment and mandatory training assignment for frontline worker onboarding automation, handle compliance training tracking for food safety, alcohol service, and regulatory certification automation, access performance metrics and skills assessment for frontline workforce development automation, retrieve location-based training assignment for multi-unit restaurant and retail training management, manage video-based learning and microlearning content for mobile-first training delivery automation, handle certification expiration tracking and renewal for ongoing compliance management, access course library and on-the-job training tracking for blended learning automation, retrieve analytics and training completion reporting for restaurant group or retail chain L&D intelligence, manage franchise and multi-unit location hierarchy for enterprise franchise training management, and integrate Schoox with HRIS (HotSchedules, ADP, 7Shifts), POS systems, and enterprise HR platforms.
use_cases: Training frontline workers from restaurant operations agents
Tracking food safety certification from compliance agents
Managing franchise training from multi-unit operators
Certifying new hires from onboarding automation agents
not_for: Knowledge worker corporate training without frontline focus (use Absorb or Docebo)
best_when: A restaurant group, retail chain, hospitality company, or franchise operator wanting AI agents to automate frontline worker training enrollment, food safety compliance certification, multi-unit training management, and mobile-first learning delivery within Schoox.
avoid_when: FOOD SAFETY CERTIFICATION ACCURACY FOR HEALTH DEPARTMENT: Automated food handler or food manager certification tracking in Schoox must accurately reflect state-recognized certification programs (ServSafe, StateFoodSafety); automated certificate issuance from non-recognized programs creates health department violation and foodborne illness liability. ALCOHOL SERVICE TRAINING COMPLIANCE: Automated responsible alcohol service training tracking (TIPS, ServSafe Alcohol) for states requiring third-party certification must verify program state recognition; automated non-recognized program completion creates TABC (Texas) or state alcohol commission violation. MINOR WORKER TRAINING HOURS: Automated training time tracking for minor workers in restaurants must comply with child labor law limitations on work hours for each age category; automated training assignment that exceeds minor work-hour limits creates FLSA child labor violation. GDPR EU EMPLOYEE FRONTLINE DATA: Automated processing of EU hospitality worker learning data must comply with GDPR employment data provisions; automated retention of EU frontline worker training records beyond statutory requirement creates GDPR violation.

auth.notes: Schoox uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Dallas, Texas HQ. Founded 2012. Private company. Workforce learning platform focused on frontline workers in restaurant, retail, and hospitality. 1,000+ enterprise customers including major restaurant chains. Mobile-first learning design. Integration with HotSchedules (Fourth), ADP, 7Shifts for HRIS. Competes with Axonify, TalentLMS, and HotSchedules Train for frontline workforce training.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-learner annual subscription with franchise and multi-unit pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per active learner; franchise and multi-unit location pricing; enterprise volume tiers
pricing.notes: Dallas TX. Private company. Founded 2012. 1,000+ enterprise restaurant/retail customers. Per-learner annual subscription with franchise volume pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; course assignment and completion API throttled per tier

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — COMPLIANCE EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Schoox does not support native webhooks for course completion or certification events; frontline compliance training completion (food safety, alcohol service) requires scheduled polling; align polling frequency with health department inspection cadence for critical certifications

FOOD SAFETY CERTIFICATION STATE RECOGNITION VERIFICATION: Automated food handler certification tracking in Schoox must verify that the digital certificate represents a state health department-recognized program; automated certificate issuance from non-recognized programs for states requiring specific programs (e.g., ANAB-accredited) creates regulatory compliance gap

HIGH-TURNOVER FRONTLINE WORKER DEPROVISIONING LATENCY: Restaurant and retail industry high turnover creates frequent HRIS-to-Schoox deprovisioning events; automated user deactivation must be near-real-time for security; batch HRIS sync with 24-hour delay creates extended access window for departed frontline workers

MULTI-UNIT LOCATION HIERARCHY FOR FRANCHISE MANAGEMENT: Automated training assignment in Schoox multi-unit franchise hierarchy must correctly map franchise location to training group; automated mis-mapping of location to wrong franchise group creates incorrect training requirements and compliance gaps for health-regulated food service

Minor worker training assignment and hour compliance — automated training assignment for frontline workers must check worker age and state child labor law hour restrictions before assigning training shifts; automated training during school hours or beyond hour limits for minors creates FLSA child labor violation

HRIS schedule integration for training timing — Schoox integration with scheduling platforms (HotSchedules, 7Shifts) for assigning training during scheduled shifts requires workforce schedule API access; automated training assignment without schedule awareness creates conflicts with shift work and training incompletion
agent_readiness.security_notes: Frontline workforce LMS. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Employee training and compliance certification data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Frontline workforce LMS. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Frontline training and compliance data.
